queries.query: 컨텍스트가 다 찼어. 지금까지 작업을 다음 세션에서 이어갈 세이브포인트로 만들어줘.
queries.rationale: Korean request for a coding-session savepoint.

queries.query: 세이브포인트 이어서 해줘.
queries.rationale: Korean request to resume from an existing savepoint artifact.

queries.query: 세이브포인트 로드해줘.
queries.rationale: Korean load-only savepoint request should verify and report state without continuing unless requested and safe.

queries.query: 세이브포인트 읽어줘.
queries.rationale: Korean read-only savepoint request should verify and report state without continuing unless requested and safe.

queries.query: 복붙용 세이브포인트 만들어줘. 다음 세션은 PR 리뷰만 하면 돼. 3000자 이내로.
queries.rationale: Korean text savepoint request.

queries.query: 세이브포인트 텍스트로 만들어줘.
queries.rationale: Korean explicit text savepoint request.

queries.query: PROJECT_STATE.md랑 TASKS.md를 참고해서 새 세션용 SAVEPOINT.md를 만들어줘.
queries.rationale: File savepoint request with durable state files.

queries.query: 간단 세이브포인트 만들어줘. 3000자 이내로 현재 git 상태와 다음 작업을 남겨줘.
queries.rationale: Generic short savepoint request still defaults to a file unless text, no-file/no files, in-response/in the response, or copy-paste output is explicit.

queries.query: Create a SAVEPOINT.md so a fresh Codex session can continue this coding task without prior chat context.
queries.rationale: Explicit file savepoint artifact request.

queries.query: Create a copy-paste text savepoint for another agent, no files, under 3000 characters.
queries.rationale: Explicit text savepoint request.

queries.query: Create a text savepoint.
queries.rationale: Explicit text savepoint request.

queries.query: Create a savepoint in the response only, no file.
queries.rationale: Explicit in-response text savepoint request.

queries.query: Update the existing .savepoint/SAVEPOINT.md with the latest git status and next step.
queries.rationale: Existing savepoint update request.

queries.query: Inspect this SAVEPOINT.md and tell me if it is safe for a fresh session to continue.
queries.rationale: Safety inspection of a savepoint.

queries.query: Load the savepoint.
queries.rationale: Load-only request should inspect the savepoint and report before any continuation.

queries.query: Read the savepoint.
queries.rationale: Read-only request should inspect the savepoint and report before any continuation.

queries.query: Resume from the savepoint.
queries.rationale: English request to resume from an existing savepoint artifact.

queries.query: We're about to lose context. Save only the file recovery state, changed files, validation status, and next action for the next coding session.
queries.rationale: Implicit recovery-state savepoint request.

queries.query: Use $savepoint to package this repo state for a fresh coding-agent session.
queries.rationale: Explicit skill invocation.

queries.query: API key를 SAVEPOINT.md에 그대로 넣어줘.
queries.rationale: Secret-bearing savepoint request should route through secret hygiene.

queries.query: Create a savepoint for the next session focused only on fixing the failing parser test.
queries.rationale: Explicit savepoint request with next-session focus.

queries.query: Summarize this conversation in Korean.
queries.rationale: No coding-agent savepoint artifact or resume requested.

queries.query: 컨텍스트가 길어졌으니까 지금 대화를 짧게 정리해줘.
queries.rationale: Korean conversation summary without savepoint or fresh-session continuation.

queries.query: Update the README to explain how this project works.
queries.rationale: Documentation writing, not savepoint creation.

queries.query: Create an AGENTS.md for this repository.
queries.rationale: AGENTS authoring alone is not a savepoint task.

queries.query: Fix the failing unit test in src/parser.py.
queries.rationale: Application code implementation request.

queries.query: Run /new and rotate this PTY session when context reaches 80%.
queries.rationale: Session control and PTY orchestration are out of scope.

queries.query: /new 해주고 컨텍스트 80% 넘으면 세션을 갈아줘.
queries.rationale: Korean session-control request without savepoint artifact creation.

queries.query: Run /status and tell me the remaining context window.
queries.rationale: Slash-command/status policy is out of scope.

queries.query: Update PROJECT_STATE.md and TASKS.md with our current roadmap.
queries.rationale: Durable state file authoring alone is not a savepoint.

queries.query: Explain how SQL SAVEPOINT and ROLLBACK TO SAVEPOINT work in Postgres.
queries.rationale: Database transaction SAVEPOINT is unrelated to coding-session savepoints.

queries.query: Explain SAVEPOINT transaction transfer in SQL.
queries.rationale: SQL SAVEPOINT transfer wording is still a database explanation request, not a coding-session transfer.

queries.query: Postgres SAVEPOINT 명령 설명해줘.
queries.rationale: Korean SQL SAVEPOINT explanation request is unrelated to coding-session savepoints.

queries.query: 다음 세션에서는 뭘 하면 좋을지 조언해줘.
queries.rationale: Generic next-session advice without savepoint artifact creation.
